hero.alt: Fresh-baked bread on a wooden counter

generated.tagline: A neighbourhood bakery on Surat's Citylight Road
generated.blurb1: Upper Crust Bakery is the kind of place you slip into in the morning before the day takes shape. The shelves and counters change through the day as fresh batches come out and the regulars filter in for their usual order. The smell of the oven sits underneath everything else.
generated.blurb2: Mornings are calm, evenings get busier as people stop by on the way home. The Citylight Road location in Athwa makes it an easy detour rather than a destination trip. Drop in once and the staff will likely remember you the second time.
